testcase.name: copywriting.acquisitionGenerate — happy path > calls CopywritingAgent(mode=acquisition), writes history agentMode=acquisition, markdown contains CTA
copywriting.acquisitionGenerate — zod validation > conversionGoal 留空 → BAD_REQUEST (转化目标必填)
copywriting.acquisitionGenerate — CTA post-validate retry > markdown 缺 CTA → execute called twice, second result used
copywriting.acquisitionGenerate — cross-account RLS isolation > history.create always uses activeAccountId from context, not a user-supplied value
